name: learnhouse
description: The official LearnHouse CLI — deploy, manage, and operate your LearnHouse instance

scripts.test: bun run build && vitest run tests/unit.test.ts tests/ee.test.ts tests/commands.test.ts tests/backup-restore.test.ts tests/prompt.test.ts tests/content-migration.test.ts tests/doctor-port.test.ts tests/doctor-dns.test.ts tests/start-migrated.test.ts tests/domain-port.test.ts tests/update-migration.test.ts tests/backup-archive-fail.test.ts tests/setup-ee-preflight.test.ts tests/update-ee.test.ts tests/setup-ci-port.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: bun run build && vitest run tests/integration.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: bun run build && vitest run --coverage --coverage.provider=v8 --coverage.include='src/**' tests/unit.test.ts tests/ee.test.ts tests/commands.test.ts tests/backup-restore.test.ts tests/prompt.test.ts tests/content-migration.test.ts tests/doctor-port.test.ts tests/doctor-dns.test.ts tests/start-migrated.test.ts tests/domain-port.test.ts tests/update-migration.test.ts tests/backup-archive-fail.test.ts tests/setup-ee-preflight.test.ts tests/update-ee.test.ts tests/setup-ci-port.test.ts

author: LearnHouse
